summary: SINGLE_FOCUS Barnsley fern IFS: 4 affine maps w/ probs (0.01, 0.85, 0.07, 0.07). Seed-fixed chaos-game pre-computes 10000 points colored by which map was applied (R/G/B/Y). ValueTracker n_tr sweeps 0→10000 with add_updater fading in dots; fern shape emerges. Live iteration counter + color legend.
